title: erigeron laevigatus
intro: Erigeron laevigatus, also known as smooth fleabane, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Erigeron laevigatus include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight infections, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable natural remedy for various health issues. Erigeron laevigatus can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used in herbal medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
